attributes.description: Alerts when `connections_accepted - connections_handled > 0`. NGINX is dropping connections — worker_connections or FDs exhausted.
attributes.name: [Nginx OTel] Dropped connections detected

investigation_guide.blob:
## NGINX dropped connections detected

### What fired
Window delta of accepted minus handled > 0.

### Why it matters
Any dropped connection is a definitive saturation signal: NGINX could not handle all incoming connections — typically because `worker_connections` is exhausted or the process hit its FD limit.

### Triage
1. Inspect `nginx.connections_current` by state.
2. Check `worker_connections` config and FD ulimit.

### Remediation
- Raise `worker_connections` / `worker_processes`.
- Raise FD limits.

### Tuning
- Fires on any drop.
